items.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
items.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

items.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
items.summary: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

items.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 貪圖20萬元報酬！日女與中國籍男子假結婚  助取得「在留資格」被識破
items.summary: 為了獲取在日本的「在留資格」（外國人合法居住日本的居留身分與活動許可），一名中國籍男子與一名日本女子涉嫌向市役所提交虛假的結婚申請書，已遭到愛知縣警方逮捕。  《東海電視台》...…

items.title: 烏克蘭無人機重創莫斯科煉油廠 估停機半年加劇俄國燃料荒
items.summary: 2名產業消息人士24日表示，莫斯科煉油廠在遭到烏克蘭無人機攻擊並嚴重受損後，將停機至少6個月，亦即今年內已無法營運，使俄羅斯解決全國燃料短缺問題的努力面臨更大挑戰。  路...…

items.title: 加州迪士尼驚魂！13歲少年玩設施突站起 從15公尺高摔落嚇壞眾人
items.summary: 加州迪士尼日前發生一場墜落意外，一名13歲遊客搭乘園區內一項水上遊樂設施，竟在車廂往下衝時站了起來，隨即從15公尺高墜落，所幸並沒有造成重傷，但這個驚悚畫面已經嚇壞眾人。  ...…
